title: Low-bandwidth family earthquake status message
summary: Send one concise status message that reduces network load and tells contacts who is safe, where the group is, and when the next update is due.
content:
Send one concise status message that reduces network load and tells contacts who is safe, where the group is, and when the next update is due.

Safe-use sequence: Use a fixed format: names accounted for, injuries or urgent need, current safe location, intended movement, and next check-in time. Define the audience, purpose, urgency, channel, backup channel, sender identity, and acknowledgement rule for “Low-bandwidth family earthquake status message”. Write short messages with place, time, verified fact, requested action, deadline, and source for “Low-bandwidth family earthquake status message”. Schedule listening and transmission windows to preserve power and reduce congestion for “Low-bandwidth family earthquake status message”. Keep a paper copy of essential contacts, frequencies, codes, instructions, and last known status for “Low-bandwidth family earthquake status message”. Test understanding through read-back or demonstration, then archive the corrected version with date and version for “Low-bandwidth family earthquake status message”. Safety limits: Official instructions and emergency services override “Low-bandwidth family earthquake status message”; do not delay evacuation or urgent help to complete the card. Do not spread unverified casualty, route, threat, medicine, or evacuation information in “Low-bandwidth family earthquake status message”. Protect private information and do not rely on one device, one platform, one person, or one power source in “Low-bandwidth family earthquake status message”. Reduced fallback: If “paper contact tree for “Low-bandwidth family earthquake status message”” is unavailable, use only a clean, labelled substitute that performs the same function; otherwise mark the missing capability and pause that step.

Stop and reassess “Low-bandwidth family earthquake status message” when different copies conflict and no version owner or correction process exists.
when_not_to_use: Do not continue “Low-bandwidth family earthquake status message” while there is live electricity, damaged wiring, water near circuits, battery swelling or heat, fuel vapour, poor ventilation, or an unknown connection.

This card is not authorization to back-feed a building, bypass protection, open an energized device, charge a damaged battery, or run fuel-burning equipment indoors.
